sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56168" key="katwnakofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατωνᾰκοφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n56168.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wearing the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κατωνάκη</foreign>, name of slaves at Sicyon, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0566.tlg001:172" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">172</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
